Priesthood is a ledership system in the [[Church of Evolution]]

It has three types

* [[Omega Priesthood]]
* [[Lambda Priesthood]]
* [[Alpha Priesthood]]

it is not to be confused with Mormon style priesthood which is closer to [[Covenants]]. Evolutionist priests are seen as leaders of their respective covenants but not differing in a fundamental way as is the case in Catholicism. Initiatory lineage is held by all people in all covenants
[[Category:Priesthood]]
[[sn:Priesthood]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
